## Summary | 摘要

<!-- What does this pull request change? / 本 Pull Request 修改了什么？ -->

## Motivation and related issues | 动机与关联 Issue

<!-- Why is this change needed? Link related issues or discussions. / 为什么需要此改动？请关联相关 Issue 或 Discussion。 -->

## Changes | 改动内容

<!-- List the important implementation or content changes. / 列出主要实现或内容变化。 -->

## Validation | 验证

<!-- Describe tests, builds, manual checks, or screenshots. / 说明测试、构建、人工检查或截图。 -->

## Compatibility and migration | 兼容性与迁移

<!-- Note API, file-format, behavior, platform, or dependency impact. Use "None" when not applicable. / 说明对 API、文件格式、行为、平台或依赖的影响；不适用时填写“无”。 -->

## Documentation | 文档

<!-- Describe documentation changes or explain why none are needed. / 说明文档更新，或解释为何无需更新。 -->

## Checklist | 检查清单

- [ ] The change is focused and contains no unrelated modifications. / 改动范围明确，不包含无关修改。
- [ ] I have tested or otherwise validated the change. / 我已测试或以其他方式验证改动。
- [ ] I have considered compatibility and migration impact. / 我已考虑兼容性和迁移影响。
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation. / 我已更新相关文档。
- [ ] I have identified third-party code, data, assets, and licenses. / 我已标明第三方代码、数据、素材及其许可证。
- [ ] I have not included secrets or sensitive personal information. / 我未提交密钥或敏感个人信息。
